Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is surgical (only files this change requires)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (added/updated tests for the change)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run eval` passes
- [ ] No fabricated benchmark numbers or unverified claims in docs
- [ ] Respects file-ownership boundaries (`src/**` = CLI/no LLM; `plugin/**` = runtime)
- [ ] No secrets, telemetry, or network calls added
